alerts.alert: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
alerts.name: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
alerts.solution: Ensure that your web server is configured to set the Content-Security-Policy header to mitigate XSS and data injection attacks.

alerts.name: Missing Anti-clickjacking Header
alerts.solution: Set X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy frame-ancestors to prevent clickjacking.

alerts.name: Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set
alerts.solution: Configure HSTS header to enforce HTTPS connections.

alerts.name: X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing
alerts.solution: Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff to prevent MIME-sniffing.

alerts.name: Re-examine Cache-control Directives
alerts.solution: For login pages, set cache-control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate to prevent credential caching.
